name: gatewayapis
description: Gateway para APIs AP - Configuração Dinâmica

scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:appmotorista" "npm run start:portaladm" "npm run start:portalclienteap" "npm run start:_ap"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "nodemon --ignore services/* server.js" "npm run dev:appmotorista" "npm run dev:portaladm" "npm run dev:portalclienteap" "npm run dev:_ap"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/apiappmotorista && npm install && cd services/apiportaladm && npm install && cd services/apiportalclienteap && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:appmotorista" "npm run start:portaladm" "npm run start:portalclienteap"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently "nodemon --ignore services/* server.js" "npm run dev:appmotorista" "npm run dev:portaladm" "npm run dev:portalclienteap"

author: José Tairone Morais
